title: Check if an Original String Exists Given Two Encoded Strings
description: Implement LeetCode 2060, Check if an Original String Exists Given Two Encoded Strings. The method must follow the stated parameter order and return the exact deterministic result. Inputs use Python values; callers need not preserve mutable inputs unless the original problem explicitly requires it. This pack paraphrases the public task and does not include platform hidden tests.
input_contract: Parameters in order: s1, s2. Inputs satisfy the public LeetCode constraints for this problem.
output_contract: Return a JSON-serializable bool using exact comparison; list order is significant where the original problem defines an ordered result.
